brand.name: CareerFlow
brand.description: Capture achievements continuously, generate resumes instantly

hero.subtitle: Get matched to your dream job with AI-powered resume optimization and job matching. Elevate your career trajectory with data-driven insights.
hero.drop_subtitle: or click to browse through your local files

features.heading: Precision-Engineered Features
features.subheading: Our AI doesn't just scan; it understands your unique career narrative and aligns it with market demands.
features.f1_desc: Our neural engine identifies semantic gaps and strengthens your professional impact with high-conversion keywords.
features.f2_desc: Proprietary algorithms bridge the gap between your skill set and real-time market opportunities globally.
features.f3_desc: Download your ATS-optimized documents in multiple high-fidelity formats ready for application.

how_it_works.heading: Your Path to Career Growth
how_it_works.subheading: Simple, powerful, and effective optimization in four steps.
how_it_works.s1_desc: Simply drag and drop your current resume to begin the journey.
how_it_works.s2_desc: Our model scans for 50+ key metrics used by top recruiters.
how_it_works.s3_desc: Receive real-time suggestions to rewrite and refine your content.
how_it_works.s4_desc: Get your polished resume and start applying to matched roles.

testimonials.heading: Trusted by Industry Leaders
testimonials.subheading: Join thousands of professionals who have accelerated their careers with AI.
testimonials.t1_quote: "The AI analysis was surprisingly accurate. It picked up on nuances in my portfolio and helped me frame my experience in a way that resonated perfectly with top-tier recruiters. I landed my role at Google within weeks of using CareerFlow."
testimonials.t2_quote: "As someone who hires engineers, I'm impressed by the quality of resumes generated here. CareerFlow doesn't just buzzword-stuff; it builds a genuine narrative of impact. Highly recommended for any serious job seeker."
testimonials.t3_quote: "The job matching feature is a game-changer. It saved me hours of scrolling through irrelevant listings by showing me exactly where my skills were most in demand. The resume optimization was the cherry on top."

footer.tagline: AI resume optimization for the modern job seeker.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: CareerFlow AI ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our service.
privacy.s1_body: We collect information you provide directly, including: resume content you upload, email address for authentication, job descriptions you paste, and profile preferences. We also automatically collect usage data such as pages visited and features used.
privacy.s2_body: We use your information to: provide and improve our AI resume optimization service, process payments through Creem (our payment processor), send transactional emails (login links, receipts), and analyze usage to improve the product.
privacy.s3_body: Your data is stored securely using Supabase (PostgreSQL) hosted on AWS infrastructure. Resume content and achievements are stored to enable the core features of the service. You may delete your data at any time by contacting us.
privacy.s4_body: Payments are processed by Creem (Armitage Labs OÜ) as merchant of record. We do not store your credit card details. Creem's privacy policy governs the handling of your payment information.
privacy.s5_body: We use essential cookies to maintain your session, remember your region preference, and enable anonymous resume uploads. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
privacy.s6_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. For EU/EEA residents, this includes rights under GDPR. For California residents, this includes rights under CCPA. To exercise these rights, contact us at support@careerflow.ai.
privacy.s7_body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Anonymous session data is retained for 90 days. You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.
privacy.s8_body: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at: support@careerflow.ai

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: CareerFlow AI is committed to making every purchase a confident one. Please read our refund policy carefully before completing your purchase.
refund.s1_body: All subscription plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you are unsatisfied with our service within 14 days of subscribing, you may request a full refund — no questions asked. Subscription fees beyond the 14-day window are non-refundable.
refund.s2_body: Single export purchases are for instant digital delivery. Once the file has been successfully downloaded, that purchase is non-refundable. If a technical issue prevented your file from downloading correctly, please contact us and we will prioritize resolving the issue or providing appropriate compensation.
refund.s3_body: Email us at support@careerflow.ai with your account email address, purchase date, and a brief description of the issue. Our support team will respond and process your request within 2 business days.
refund.s4_body: Once your refund request is approved, the amount will be returned to your original payment method. Processing typically takes 5–10 business days depending on your bank or payment provider.
refund.s5_body: Payments for CareerFlow AI are processed by Creem (Armitage Labs OÜ) as the merchant of record. Refunds are also handled through Creem and are subject to their refund policies. You may also submit a refund request directly through Creem's support channels if preferred.
refund.s6_body: For any refund-related questions, please reach out to: support@careerflow.ai. We are committed to responding within 2 business days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of CareerFlow AI. By using our service, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1_body: CareerFlow AI provides AI-powered resume optimization tools, including resume parsing, achievement extraction, job description matching, and export functionality.
terms.s2_body: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. By using CareerFlow AI, you represent that you meet this requirement.
terms.s3_body: You agree to: provide accurate information, use the service only for lawful purposes, not attempt to circumvent any security measures, and not use the service to generate misleading or fraudulent resumes.
terms.s4_body: For users in paid markets, payments are processed by Creem (Armitage Labs OÜ) acting as the merchant of record. By completing a purchase, you also agree to Creem's Buyer Terms of Service. We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for subscription plans.
terms.s5_body: Subscription plans include a 14-day money-back guarantee. Single export purchases are non-refundable once the file has been downloaded. To request a refund, contact us at support@careerflow.ai.
terms.s6_body: You retain ownership of the resume content you provide. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of providing the service.
terms.s7_body: CareerFlow AI is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee employment outcomes. Results may vary based on individual circumstances and market conditions.
terms.s8_body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CareerFlow AI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.s9_body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s10_body: For questions about these terms, contact us at: support@careerflow.ai
